title: Cozy Cabins and Cottages
description: Cozy cabins, cottages and other smaller buildings. - No mobs or combat. just simple loot and adorable designs to discover.
body:
# Cozy Cabins and Cottages is inspired by the "Cozy" style game:

~No mobs are added to these structures.

~Each building will be relativly small

~Some buildings will have minor starter loot or other useful objects for traveling or early game.

~Some buildings may have villagers

~A little over 30 buildings as of the current release. All located in the Overworld. Located in almost every biome.

~NO added blocks, mobs, textures or other non-vanilla elements

~NO Dependancies

~Easy to customize for your modpack: Only one loot table added



So enjoy exploring these cute little structures knowing you wont have to battle your way through them. Just enjoy discovering them on your journeys. Make one of them your own home, or just pause and rest along your way in a safe and comfortable little abode.

I was inspired to create this mod after I made a post on Reddit asking for for input on my Combat structure (availabe here: [https://modrinth.com/mod/combat-structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/combat-structures )

Many folks asked if it was possible to include structures that _didn't_ involve mobs or combat. Given the theme of my other wob WAS to have combat involved with looting the strucutres, I decided to create this new structure mod that was entirely free of added mobs. So enjoy, you all asked for it and here it is!
